node.text: James is willing to introduce John to the organization where he volunteered.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "remaining money dog shelter friends") on Session 15 (Score: 0.76)

node.text: James and his family visited an animal sanctuary on the road trip and saw many cute rescue dogs.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "remaining money dog shelter") on Observation 2 (Score: 0.64)

node.text: James already has three dogs at home and believes having more than three dogs is too much.
James is supportive of John's goal to make a positive impact on the world.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "remaining money dog shelter friends") on Session 15 (Score: 0.76)

node.text: James indicated that no interview is required for volunteering, just the willingness to help people.
